summary: Frontend additions implement an admin Dashboard notifications section for pending pause requests and a member-facing membership/pause-request status card. Backend changes introduce a new pause request status variant (#expired) and add a migration module, but the diff does not clearly show the required 3-day auto-rejection being persisted as status=denied with processedAt and the specified adminMessage across all read paths.

missing_requirements.requirement: Auto-reject pending pause requests older than 3 days by persisting status=denied, setting processedAt, and setting adminMessage to "Auto-rejected due to no admin action within 3 days" (unless adminMessage already exists), and apply this consistently anywhere pause requests are read.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend diff introduces a new PauseRequestStatus variant (#expired) and migration types to include #expired, which conflicts with the requirement to persist auto-rejections as status=denied. The provided truncated backend/main.mo snippet does not show logic that (a) detects >3 days on read, (b) persists the change, (c) sets processedAt, and (d) sets the required adminMessage across all pause-request read endpoints.
evidence: backend/main.mo (PauseRequestStatus includes #expired; only shows pauseRequestExpiryPeriod constant, not the required persistence logic)
backend/migration.mo (introduces NewPauseRequestStatus with #expired and migrates pauseRequests)

hallucinated_features.description: Introduced a new pause request status variant "expired" (#expired) and related migration, rather than representing auto-rejection as status=denied as specified.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest/REQ-12 requires expired pending requests to be updated to status=denied (with processedAt and adminMessage). The diff adds #expired to PauseRequestStatus and migrates data to include it, which is not requested and may contradict the required behavior.

hallucinated_features.description: Added a separate backend migration module file (backend/migration.mo), moving logic out of backend/main.mo.
hallucinated_features.reason: Constraints state: "Backend must remain a single Motoko actor with all logic in backend/main.mo". Adding backend/migration.mo introduces additional backend logic outside main.mo, and it is not requested by the BuildRequest.
evidence: backend/main.mo (imports Migration "migration" and uses (with migration = Migration.run))
